title: . Refusal of examination or treatment. If the employee unreasonably refuses to submit to medical
content:
. Refusal of examination or treatment. If the employee unreasonably refuses to submit to medical 
examination or treatment, the System shall stop the payment of further compensation during such time as 
such refusal continues. What constitutes an unreasonable refusal shall be determined by the System which 
may, on its own initiative, determine the necessity, character and sufficiency of any medical services furnished 
or to be furnished.
